   +------------------------+   
   |    Banking Customer    |   
   +------------------------+   
   | [Person]               |   
   | A customer of the bank |   
   +------------------------+   
                |               
                | Uses          
                v               
+------------------------------+
|       Internet Banking       |
+------------------------------+
| [System]                     |
| Lets customers view accounts |
+------------------------------+
                |               
                | Sends mail    
                v               
      +-------------------+     
      |   E-mail System   |     
      +-------------------+     
      | [External System] |     
      | Sendmail          |     
      +-------------------+
